_comment: CalisTrack Pro pricing + benefits. priceUsd is the anchor/high-geo price; priceTry is a store-native LOCAL tier for Turkey (NOT an FX conversion). Research-backed (docs/strategy/2026-06-03-monetization-strategy-brief.md). TODO(owner): map each plan id to a real RevenueCat/store product before charging.
_benefitsNote: Every benefit here is actually gated in-app: AI generation (programs_screen), full skill-trees (skills_screen), advanced analytics (progress_screen), and ad removal (entitlement).
proBenefits: AI-generated programs tailored to your level & goals
Full skill-trees: muscle-up, front lever & planche
Advanced analytics: 30-day volume, frequency & top movement
